name: Rahul Modi
quote: Chirag is an exceptional developer who possesses all the skills one would want in an excellent software developer. He has been a great resource in the college. He did an incredible job on all college projects, making timely deliveries. His work is always top-notch, and he is always welcoming to feedback and making improvements. Plus, Chirag is self-motivated and a great team player.

name: Arpit Goyal
quote: Chirag is a very skilled person. He has worked on multiple technologies and built efficient projects on trending technologies. He is a very hardworking person who is always ready to learn new skills and implement them. He has good problem-solving skills and is well suited for working in a challenging work environment. He has very good ranks in prestigious exams of India. He has also secured Rank 1 in his college coding competition.

quote: He is a very talented and skilled person. He has worked on multiple technologies and built multiple efficient projects.
